problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
